about.label: Our Heritage
about.title:
Rooted in Ayurveda,
Blossoming for Generations
about.subtitle: A story of tradition, purity, and purpose.
about.mission.label: Our Mission
about.mission.title: Making Wellness Accessible
about.story.p1: Padmanabh Ayurvedics was born from a simple belief — that nature holds the answer to every ailment. Founded in the heart of Maharashtra, we have spent decades perfecting ancient formulations passed down through generations.
about.story.p2: Every herb we use is ethically sourced. Every product is crafted with intent. Our team of certified Ayurvedic practitioners oversees the entire process — from field to bottle.
about.story.p3: We don't just sell products. We offer a way of life rooted in balance, purity, and harmony with nature.
